titleStmt.title: SII 41.88: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 88. (A.R. No. 87 of 1905.) Tiruttarakōsamaṅgai, Ramnad Taluk, Ramnad District. On the east wall of the kitchen of the Maṅgalēśvara temple at Tiruttarakōsamaṅgai.

p.hi: Madurai Nāyaka, Muttuvīrappa-nāyaka, Śaka 1530, Kīlaka, Āni, Pūrva 7, Monday, star Rōhiṇi (irregular) = 1608 A.D.

summary.p: Records that one Kallūr-kiḻavar Tiruvirunda-perumāḷ donated the taxes, kāval-achchu and ettuvaḻi, from his sīrmai to conduct a festival in the temple for the merit of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakātta
m 1000 5 100 3 10 Iteṉ
mel kilaka varuṣam Āni
mātam 10 2 pūṟuvapakkattu
cattamiyum coma
vāramum rokaṇiyum
Amutayokamum peṟṟa
ṉāṉaṭcettiram peṟ
ṟaṉāḷ kallūr kiḻavar ti
ruvirunta perumāḷe
ṉ cempiṉāṭṭil ti
ruvuttarakocamaṅ
kai naiṉār maṅkai
pperumāḷ nayiṉāṟ
ku Ānittiruvuḷā naṭatta
vum mārkaḻit tiruppo
ṉṉūcal tiruvuḷā
naṭakkum paṭikku mu
ttu virappaṉāyakkar Ay
yaṉukkup puṇṇiyamā
ka nammuṭaiya perile
kiḷcirmaiyile kūṭṭi
naṭatta kāvalaccu peru
m Aṟupattañcu poṉ
ṉum Ēttuvaḻi Eḻupatu
poṉṉum Āka nūṟṟu
muppattañcu poṉṉum
cuvāmiyār tiruvuḷā
vukku kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭapaṭi
yiṉālē Intappaṭikku
c caṟuvamāṉiyamāka ka
lveṭṭip poṭuvitta
paṭikku Intappaṭiye
cantirātittar cantatippi
ṟavecame naṭakkum
paṭi paṇṇicceyyavum
Itukku yātāmoruvar
Akutam paṇṇiṉa per
kaḷ keṅkai karaiyi
lum cetukkaraiyilu
m mātā pitāvaiyum
civapirāmaṇaraiyum go
vataiyum koṉṟa to
ṣattile pokak kaṭava
rākavum§
Digital edition of SII 41.88 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
